title: thesium costatum var. costatum
intro: Thesium costatum var. costatum is a variety of the Thesium costatum plant, also known as the 'alpine thyme' or 'thymus', a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to high-altitude areas of the Himalayas and surrounding regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Thesium costatum var. costatum include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using its essential oil in aromatherapy and skincare products.
